---
title: "Research"
---

## Publications

**Using Large Language Models in Research: An Experiment with the Narrative Policy Framework** (forthcoming)  
R&R at *Policy Studies Journal*  

**Preemption and Generational Health Equity: The Role of Forced Inaction in Shaping Outcomes** (2026)  
[*Milbank Quarterly*](https://doi.org/10.1111/1468-0009.70078)
